---
title: "Náš turistický deník"
subtitle: ""
lightbox:
  match: auto
  effect: fade
crossref:
  fig-title: Figure
  tbl-title: Table
format: 
  html: 
    page-layout: full
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 300px
      body-width: 1000px
      margin-width: 50px
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    toc-title: Kde už jsme byli
    toc-expand: 2
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
    # html-math-method: katex
    smooth-scroll: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
    theme: materia
    css: style/template.css
    linkcolor: '#085391'
    highlight-style: pygments
    code-overflow: wrap
    code-line-numbers: false
    code-copy: true
    code-link: true
    code-block-bg: true     
    # code-block-border-left: "#e3e3e3"
    backgroundcolor: white
    show-code: false
    tbl-cap-location: top
    fig-align: center
    tbl-align: center
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  warning = FALSE, 
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8, 
  fig.height = 7, 
  fig.align = 'center'
)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)

# Path to images
images_path <- "C:/Users/Tom/Desktop/Hiking_diary/fotky/"

# Data of visited places
adventures <- read.csv("Hiking_diary.csv") 
adventures <- adventures %>% 
  mutate(X = 1:nrow(adventures))

# Icons according to the type
ikony <- awesomeIcons(
  icon = 'flag',
  iconColor = 'white',
  library = 'fa',
  markerColor = case_when(
    adventures$typ == "hut" ~ "blue",
    adventures$typ == "peak" ~ "red",
    adventures$typ == "ferrata" ~ "green",
    adventures$typ == "camp" ~ "orange",
    TRUE ~ "gray"
  )
)
```

# Mapa

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
# 
leaflet(adventures[!is.na(adventures$typ), ]) %>%
  addProviderTiles("CartoDB.Positron") %>%
  addAwesomeMarkers(
    ~lon, ~lat,
    icon = ikony,
    popup = ~paste0(
      "<b>", nazev, "</b><i>  (", typ, ")</i><br>", datum, "<br>",
      popis_kratky, "<br>")
  ) %>% 
    addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    title = "Typ místa",
    colors = c("blue","red","green", "orange"),
    labels = c("horská chata","vrchol","ferrata", "camp"),
    opacity = 0.5
  )
```

# Ferraty

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
ferrata_ids <- adventures %>% 
  filter(typ == "ferrata") %>% 
  select(X) %>% c() %>% unlist()
for(id in ferrata_ids) {
  cat(paste0("## ", adventures[id, "nazev"], "\n\n",
             adventures[id, "popis_dlouhy"], "\n\n"))
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto1"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto1"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto2"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto2"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
}
```

# Vrcholy

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
peak_ids <- adventures %>% 
  filter(typ == "peak") %>% 
  select(X) %>% c() %>% unlist()
for(id in peak_ids) {
  cat(paste0("## ", adventures[id, "nazev"], "\n\n",
             adventures[id, "popis_dlouhy"], "\n\n"))
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto1"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto1"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto2"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto2"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
}
```

# Horské chaty

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
huts_ids <- adventures %>% 
  filter(typ == "hut") %>% 
  select(X) %>% c() %>% unlist()

for(id in huts_ids) {
  cat(paste0("## ", adventures[id, "nazev"], "\n\n",
             adventures[id, "popis_dlouhy"], "\n\n"))
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto1"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto1"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto2"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto2"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
}
```

# Kempy

```{r}
#| results: asis
#| echo: false
camp_ids <- adventures %>% 
  filter(typ == "camp") %>% 
  select(X) %>% c() %>% unlist()

for(id in camp_ids) {
  cat(paste0("## ", adventures[id, "nazev"], "\n\n",
             adventures[id, "popis_dlouhy"], "\n\n"))
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto1"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto1"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
  if (!is.na(adventures[id, "foto2"])) {cat(paste0("![](", images_path, adventures[id, "foto2"], "){width=20%}\n\n"))}
}
```
